tasks.title: Silice Ontology Bootstrap
tasks.description: Create /.silice/ directory with constitution.md, blueprint.md, backlog.json, and codebase.json.

tasks.title: Vite Project Setup
tasks.description: Initialize pnpm Vite project. Add Matter.js, bezier-js, Dexie dependencies. Configure vite.config.js.

tasks.title: Design System & CSS Foundation
tasks.description: Implement dark mode design system with CSS custom properties, glassmorphism utilities, micro-animations, and typography (Outfit/Inter).

tasks.title: Board Topology Generator
tasks.description: Implement configurable asymmetric board with Anchor Zones (Grid) and Void Expanses.

tasks.title: Piece Model & Type System
tasks.description: Implement Piece class with type system (BASE, DAMPENER, AMPLIFIER, SLINGSHOT).

tasks.title: Physics Engine (Matter.js + Rapier2D dual)
tasks.description: Dual physics via PhysicsAdapter. Matter.js for dev, Rapier2D/Tauri for production. Auto-detection via IPCDetector.

tasks.title: Bezier Trace Input System
tasks.description: Mouse-based cubic Bezier curve drawing with multi-segment support.

tasks.title: Turn Manager & Game Loop
tasks.description: State machine managing game flow. Animates piece along Bezier curve, resolves physics, scores.

tasks.title: Canvas Renderer (modular layers)
tasks.description: Centralized canvas rendering with separate Board, Piece, Trace, Effects, HUD renderers.

tasks.title: Configuration Screen
tasks.description: Full-featured board configuration UI. Controls for layout, grid size, cell size, empty space.

tasks.title: HUD — Heads-Up Display
tasks.description: In-game overlay: turn indicator, scores, PAUSE button. Updates via EventBus.

tasks.title: Integration Room (Post-Game)
tasks.description: Symmetric text editor for both players. Game statistics panel. Ollama synthesis. Export game record.

tasks.title: Replayer Database (Dexie/IndexedDB)
tasks.description: Persist game records with IDs, dates, board states, move history. Animated kinetic replayer module.

tasks.title: Application Bootstrap & Screen Router
tasks.description: Screen state machine: CONFIG -> GAME -> BINDU_PAUSE -> INTEGRATION -> REPLAYER. Wires all modules.

tasks.title: Tauri Desktop Shell
tasks.description: Tauri v2 shell with Rust backend, IPC commands, and window configuration.

tasks.title: Rust Physics Backend (modular)
tasks.description: Rapier2D physics engine in Rust with modular structure (types, core, walls, piece, impulse, collision).

tasks.title: Ollama/Gemma Integration Room AI
tasks.description: Ollama integration for post-game philosophical synthesis. Graceful degradation when unavailable.

tasks.title: Rust AST Indexer (modular)
tasks.description: Tree-sitter based codebase indexer that generates silice/codebase.json Digital Twin.

tasks.title: Atomic File Decomposition — Frontend
tasks.description: Full modular decomposition: core/, config/, ui/, engine/{board,pieces,trace,animation,physics,collision,scoring,render}/, db/{schema,repositories}/, ai/, utils/. EventBus architecture.

tasks.title: Atomic File Decomposition — Rust Backend
tasks.description: Split src-tauri/src/ into commands/, physics/ (7 files), ai/ (3 files). Max ~60 lines per file.

tasks.title: silice-indexer decomposition
tasks.description: Split monolithic main.rs into config.rs, parser.rs, serializer.rs, indexer.rs, main.rs.

tasks.title: Dual Physics Engine Architecture
tasks.description: PhysicsAdapter interface with Matter.js fallback and Tauri/Rapier2D production engine. Auto-detection via IPCDetector.

tasks.title: Game Loop Throttling
tasks.description: Physics tick at 50ms intervals instead of every frame. Momentum detection to skip idle ticks.

tasks.title: Collision Damage with Velocity Threshold (Rapier2D)
tasks.description: Process CollisionEvent::Started with relative velocity check (MIN_IMPACT_VELOCITY=5). Piece-specific onCollision behaviors via DamageResolver on JS side.

tasks.title: Tauri Window Size Increase
tasks.description: Window 1400x900, min 1200x700 to match board dimensions.

tasks.title: silice-indexer edition fix
tasks.description: Fixed Cargo.toml edition from 2024 (invalid) to 2021 for Rust stable compatibility.

tasks.title: Piece Type Special Behaviors
tasks.description: Implemented type-specific collision: Dampener damage reduction, Amplifier shockwave, Slingshot curve-length damage multiplier.

tasks.title: Ghost Traces & Animated Replay
tasks.description: GhostTrailRenderer for semi-transparent past traces. ReplayEngine for animating past games from IndexedDB.

tasks.title: Integration Room Stats & Export
tasks.description: Game statistics panel (scores, kills, damage). JSON export button. Ollama fallback via direct HTTP.

tasks.title: Board Initialization with Starting Pieces
tasks.description: Board.generateStartingPieces() creates initial piece distribution across anchor zones.

tasks.title: Backlog JSON Synchronization
tasks.description: All new tasks added, statuses synchronized across codebase changes.
